title: 8 Signs of a Godly Man Who Actually Walks Humbly
caption:
Fake humility performs for a room. Real humility doesn't need the room to know.

He can take correction without going quiet or getting defensive. He gives credit away fast and keeps blame slow. He asks questions he already half-knows the answer to. He lets a younger guy be right in front of him. He apologizes without needing the last word.

He's fine being forgotten if the work still got done. He can lose an argument and still love the guy who won it. He kneels in private as often as he'd want you to see.

"Well done, good and faithful servant." — Matthew 25:23

The posture nobody's watching is the real one.

Save this and check yourself against one tonight.

#faith #humility #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #matthew #scripture #character
